ac: AC1: Completion Report Contract in playbook
evidence: ilr-playbook.md contains the paste-verbatim contract incl. 'an ended turn with no report is a failed task'.

ac: AC2: Auto-Handoff Pipeline section + gate-word discipline
evidence: ilr-system.md has the section; 'approved' is the sole spec-gate word; 'go/ship' valid only at ship gate (multiline grep); same-turn follow-up = amend.

ac: AC3: split routing + ground-truth bound + override-never-exit
evidence: gate-BLOCK->evidence-repair vs AC-FAIL->re-implement; bound counted from committed ground truth; override explicitly not a loop exit.

ac: AC4: Pipeline State in both templates + advisory
evidence: ## Pipeline State added to ilr-system.md AND spec.md templates; documented advisory, reconcile against ground truth on resume.

ac: AC5: never-idle rule in CLAUDE.md + guardrails
evidence: 'Never idle without handoff' in CLAUDE.md and ilr-system.md guardrail 6, framed as detection-not-guarantee.

ac: AC6: single active pipeline + worktree transition
evidence: ilr-system.md states 'One active pipeline per issue' and worktree entry as part of approval->implement.
spec.md step 7 begins implementation on 'approved' + last-call-to-amend; witness.md step 7 auto-routes (bounded).
witness.md carries the override-never-a-loop-exit rule (multiline grep); playbook/system/CLAUDE.md agree on the two gates + routing.
bound derived from committed Review History / verification.jsonl fail-lines, not a self-incremented field; mechanical hook filed as follow-up.

premortem: gate-block routed as re-implement, override used to escape
evidence: split routing (gate-block->evidence-repair); override banned as loop exit in witness.md + ilr-system.md; escalation is the only exit.
gate-word discipline + last-call-to-amend added, but push-back-rate health metric is a convention only; watch over cycles.
'go' reserved for ship; same-turn follow-up = amend; 'last call to amend' emitted at the transition.

premortem: resumed session trusts stale Pipeline State
evidence: Pipeline State documented advisory; resume reconciles against labels + verification.jsonl + git log; ground truth wins.
